feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Close GRPO through dtw
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

May I ask if we can close the open GRPO docs through DTW. If yes. how to make DTW template.

I make template for OPDN and PDN1 but I have random error.  will appreciate if you have template thank you in advance.

 

 

Regards.

entry.title: E Invoice of Standard SAP
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
In SAP B1, for E-Invoice Genration, Jason file is created through Elecronic Doucuments.
For one database, Jason file is generated nad uploaded on NIC portal sucessfully.
For second database, in same server is showing an error.
 
After checking jason file it shows version number different.
 
The database server is same and sap version is also same how the version of jason file  is different.
Please guide on the same.

entry.title: -132 Error during SBO user authentication
entry.content:
Dears,

I am using IIS service to connect SAP Business One 10.00.170 FP 2108 via DI API using following code which works perfectly , recently we upgraded to SAP Business One 10.00.210 FP 2305 and facing following error while connecting to DB.

-132 Error during SBO user authentication

 public SAPbobsCOM.Company fnGetCompany()
 {
     oCompany = new Company();
     oCompany.Server = "NDB@SAPHANA:30013";
     oCompany.LicenseServer = "SAPHANA:40000";
     oCompany.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_HANADB;
     oCompany.CompanyDB = "TEST_COMPANY";
     oCompany.UserName = "manager";
     oCompany.Password = "****";
     oCompany.DbUserName = "****";
     oCompany.DbPassword = "*****";
     oCompany.UseTrusted = true;
     oCompany.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English;
     oCompany.SLDServer = "SAPHANA:40000";
     int result = oCompany.Connect();
     if (result != 0)
     {
         MessageBox.Show( oCompany.GetLastErrorCode() + " " + oCompany.GetLastErrorDescription());
     }
         return oCompany;

 }

What could be possible reasons ? @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: error during sap connection
entry.content:
I'm getting the error 'Failed to create COM object `SAPbobsCOM.Company': Class not registered' when trying to connect PHP with SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.190) FP 2202 (64-bit).

my php error line is"$mycomp = new COM("SAPbobsCOM.Company") or die("Cannot start SBO");"

entry.title: This plugin is not supported error SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have setup all steps to run the dashboard into SAP B1 SQL version. But I am facing error like This plugin is not supported. 

What is the solution for that error like This plugin is not supported.

 

Kind regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Can't use alias in a Service Layer SQLQueries ORDER BY clause
entry.content:
Hi

I have tried to create an entry in Service Layer SQLQueries on SAP Business One 10  SP2402 with the following:

 

select top 12 RDR1.ItemCode, sum(RDR1.Quantity) as Q
from RDR1 where RDR1.DocEntry in
(select top 50 ORDR.DocEntry from ORDR where ORDR.CardCode = :bpid order by ORDR.DocDate desc)
group by RDR1.ItemCode
order by Q desc

 

but it fails with

 

400 Bad Request
error code 703
message: Column 'Q' from table 'RDR1' not exist.

 

I did try other simpler queries also using an alias in the order by clause, but they all fail the same way.

Thanks, Denes

entry.title: Internal Error using Quick Copy - SBO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'am having an Internal Error (-1) [131-183] using Quick Copy (#QuickCopy).

1 month ago it works perfectly and now 1 DB gives me thie error and 1 DB not.

Does someone have an idea?

Thanks a lot,

Francesca

entry.title: journal entry FC exchange rate
entry.content:
I have created a manual journal entry just for training purposes. I managed to save it without entering the exchange rate for the foreign currency . how can I fix it to get the proper report regards the local currency balance and foreign currency and also the system currency. 

 

am using sap business one

entry.title: SAP Business One Mobile app, SAP Business One Service and SAP Business One Sales mobile app
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried to access the 'Demo' of the SAP Business One Mobile App, SAP Business One Sales App, and SAP Business One Service App, but was not able to access them and encountered errors. See the attached error messages for the respective apps. I have tested since last week but have never had a chance to be able to access it. Could it be that the that the SAP server for the mobile apps is down?

SAP Business One Mobile App error: Permission Denied. I'm accessing the SAP Demo system, it does not required any special setup, for the past I can access without issue, why now prompt error 'Permission Denied'?

SAP Business One Service App error: Log in failed. I'm accessing the SAP Demo system, it does not required any special setup, for the past I can access without issue, why now prompt error 'Log in failed'?

SAP Business One Sales App error: Log in failed. I'm accessing the SAP Demo system, it does not required any special setup, for the past I can access without issue, why now why prompt error 'Log in failed'?

entry.title: How to set "CopyToTargetDoc" in Attachments to No when "CopyAttachmentsFromBaseToTarget" equals Yes?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to attach a file to a marketing document but it should not be copied to target documents.

In the UI you can uncheck the checkbox when the setting at company level is checked, but using the value tNO via Service Layer or DI API does not seem to work, neither in attachment creation or in an update operation.

However, when the company setting is set to No, you can set CopyToTargetDoc to Yes as expected.

Here you have a sample payload for Attachments2 endpoint. CopyToTargetDoc is stored as tYES.


{
    "Attachments2_Lines": [
        {
            "FileExtension": "txt",
            "FileName": "Prueba_adjunto",
            "SourcePath": "C:\\Users\\jdelviso\\Desktop",
            "CopyToTargetDoc": "tNO"
        }
    ]
}
 
System info:
 
SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.180) FP 2111 (64-bit)

entry.title: Angular
entry.content: What is the use of Angular in SAP Business One ? Where can I get a link for studying it ?

entry.title: Exchange rate update for existing transactions for foreign vendors and customers in sap b1
entry.content:
I have a client that went to close the production order without receipt for production and at the end the remaining went to wastages. How can we reverse the production order for the wastages to be reversed in SAP.

Hope to get your response.

entry.title: Sales Order Status showing Unapproved even it got approved via Approval Stages in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I encountered a scenario where Sales order Doc.Status = 'Unapproved' even though document got approved successfully via approval stages.  It's displaying as Sales order(Approved) // Doc.Status ='Unapproved' as shown on below image. 

Here, Document Settings >> Per Document >> Sales order >> Sales Order Approved (Checked/Selected) successfully. 

Even though above setting done and Sales Order approved via approval stages - My Sales Order documents are being as unapproved. 

Note: I saw many SAP threads suggesting user to Click on Approved check box Field >> Under Logistics Tab in Sales Order >> Update. I tried and it worked. Doc status changing to 'Open' when I do this manually. 

But, I don't want to do this manually every time because there might be a situation where 100 orders a day staying unapproved and I cannot approve all 100 sales order going to logistics TAB manually. 

Question 1: Could anyone suggest me in your experience - Under what all cases/scenarios SO document is 'Sales Order[Approved]' but Doc.Status ='Unapproved' .. ????? 

Question 2: Suggest me how to achieve : Sales Order[Approved] and Doc.Status = 'Open' without any manual intervention every time. 

Your suggestions will be highly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

Best Regards,

 

SAP Business One

entry.title: No existen registros coincidentes 'Grupo de autorización' (OUGR) (ODBC -2028) [Mensaje 131-183]
entry.content:
Estimados:

Tengo este problema cada vez que quiero actualizar algun dato del usuario, me aparece el siguiente mensaje segun la imagen, tengo usuarios que tienen asigandos grupos de autorizaciones como tambien de formularios y por mas que quito el usuario que quiere actualizar de ese grupo igual me sale el mensaje cuando quiero actualizar un datos de este.

Por favor si hay algun paso que hacer o alguna nota que me permita corregir y poder actualizar los datos de los usuarios sin problemas

entry.title: Setting Up Specific A/R Invoice Layouts for Users in User Defaults
entry.content:
In the User Defaults, there is a Print tab. The A/R Invoice option is selected on this tab in the document drop-down list. Additionally, the Export to PDF checkbox is checked. This configuration exports an A/R Invoice to a PDF file using the default layout when a document is created.

The requirement is to export A/R Invoices to PDF with layouts other than the default. We want to create multiple User Defaults, each catering to a specific group of users who export A/R Invoice PDFs. Each User Default should export the A/R Invoice PDF with a custom layout instead of the default one.

entry.title: SAP B1 - To replicate the system form matrix CFL that shows suggestions as you type in a UDO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a SAP form .b1f made in Visual Studio for an addon.

I want to replicate the below as in system forms:

I want users to see that white box of suggestions as they type.

How to do so in a user defined form? I have tried and cannot find a way.

Regards,

entry.title: How to convert draft documents to formal documents after modifying the approval status of DI API
entry.content:
Hello Experts:

  I have encountered a problem. After using the DI API to modify the approval status, the draft document status has already been modified, but still one draft document has not been added as a formal document. What should I do or where can I find some relevant information?

entry.title: Line loop on Grid excluding first four lines
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I have come up with an interesting dilemma and for the life of me I cannot figure out a clear explanation as to why it is happening.

I am running a loop over the lines on a grid and checking whether the PickedQty > 0, if it is then the line is included in a stock transfer document. This is working perfectly fine if include any lines from the fifth one onwards, however, if I include any one of the first four lines OR if I include any of the first four lines in addition to the fifth line onwards then I still get a success message but no transfer document is made.

When I try any of the first four rows I get the processing line x / x status message so I know the condition is correct for that part of the code to trigger.

try
{

    // Define a flag to track if any rows with PickedQty > 0 are found
    bool rowsFound = false;

    Grid grid = (Grid)form.Items.Item("BOY_1").Specific;
    int rowsCount = grid.Rows.Count;

    // Iterate over the grid rows to check for PickedQty > 0
    for (int i = 0; i < rowsCount; i++)
    {
        int qty = Convert.ToInt32(grid.DataTable.GetValue("PickedQty", i));
        
        if (qty > 0)
        {
            rowsFound = true;
            break; // Exit the loop as soon as a row with PickedQty > 0 is found
        }
    }

    // If no rows with PickedQty > 0 are found, alert the user and exit
    if (!rowsFound)
    {
        application.StatusBar.SetText("No rows with Picked Quantity greater than 0 are selected.", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
        return; // Exit the method
    }

    // Proceed with creating the stock transfer document
    SAPbobsCOM.StockTransfer transfer = (SAPbobsCOM.StockTransfer)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oStockTransfer);
    transfer.DocDate = DateTime.Now;
    transfer.FromWarehouse = "2WM";
    transfer.ToWarehouse = "2WM";

    // Iterate over all rows in the grid and process those with PickedQty > 0
    for (int i = 0; i < rowsCount; i++)
    {
        string ItemCode = grid.DataTable.GetValue("ItemCode", i).ToString();
        string Warehouse = grid.DataTable.GetValue("WhsCode", i).ToString();
        int qty = Convert.ToInt32(grid.DataTable.GetValue("PickedQty", i));

        // Process only rows with PickedQty > 0
        if (qty > 0)
        {
            application.StatusBar.SetText("Processing line " + (i + 1) + "/" + rowsCount, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
            transfer.Lines.ItemCode = ItemCode;
            transfer.Lines.FromWarehouseCode = "2WM";
            transfer.Lines.WarehouseCode = Warehouse;
            transfer.Lines.Quantity = qty;
            transfer.Lines.Add();
        }
    }

    // Check if any lines were added to the transfer document
    if (transfer.Lines.Count > 0)
    {
        transfer.Add();
        application.StatusBar.SetText("All items successfully transferred", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
    }
    else
    {
        application.StatusBar.SetText("No items with Picked Quantity greater than 0 to transfer", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
    }

    // Release the COM object
    System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal.ReleaseComObject(transfer);
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
    // Handle the exception gracefully
    application.StatusBar.SetText("Error: " + ex.Message, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
}

Hopefully someone else can see some reason I am missing as to why it is doing this, i'm stumped. Happy to provide further context if required.

Kind Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Libro diario oficial resumido
entry.content:
Hola expertos!

Necesito general un libro diario resumido y no doy con la tecla. 

Al seleccionar "Totales" y mes, me sale el total por meses pero no me sale la cuenta contable.

Lo que busco es una tabla donde se me muestre la cuenta contable a 2 dígitos. Ahora mismo me muestra el mes y la nomenclatura de los documentos. 

¿alguien me puede ayudar?

 

Lo que sale ahora mismo:

 

Lo que me gustaría que saliera: La primera columna muestra los 3 primeros digitos de la cuenta contable y agrupa por esto.

entry.title: User Account Control
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask for your help.
Everytime I try to open SAP B1 10.0 Client (SQL), User Account Control prompts. The User is a Normal User.

Thanks.
